MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Oct-19-2009 Assigned To Trial Court

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Oct-19-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Settlement. Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Lois Jones, CSR #3689.

Plaintiff Robert Graham was present in pro per, placed under oath and examined.
Robert J. Fordiani, Esq. and Melvin Caesar Belli appeared with defendant Sylvia Jones, who was placed under oath and examined.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial was filed on October 1, 2009.

Settlement Agreement reached by the parties was placed on the record by Mr. Belli. Pursuant to the terms of said agreement, defendant Sylvia Jones shall pay plaintiff Robert Graham $2,000.00 per month for the months of October 2009, November 2009 & December 2009. Plaintiff Robert Graham shall waive all arrearages, other than rent, owed by defendant Sylvia Jones. Defendant shall vacate the subject premises on or before December 31, 2009. In return, plaintiff Robert Graham will dismiss this matter, with prejudice, forty-eight hours after defendant Sylvia Jones vacates the premises. This stipulation for entry of judgment for possession shall be stayed pending defendant's compliance with this agreement.

If defendant Sylvia Jones does not comply with the terms of this agreement, plaintiff Robert Graham may, with forty-eight hours not to defendant, obtain judgment for possession on ex parte application.

Defendant Sylvia Jones's security deposit shall be returned pursuant to the applicable Civil Code Section.

Parties were voir dired by the Court as to the terms and there understanding of this agreement. This agreement will be reduced to writing by Mr. Belli.

Notice Of Motion For Order Compelling Answers To Interrogatories And Request For Order Imposing Monetary Sanctions

MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:

The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer privately for settlement discussions.

This case did NOT settle. TRIAL DATE of OCT-19-2009 REMAINS.
